    @allure.title("TC-LOGIN-001: 正确手机号+验证码登录成功")
    @pytest.mark.parametrize("data", TEST_DATA["register_login"]["success"])
    def test_register_login_success(self, user_api, data):
        with allure.step(f"发送登录请求: tel_num={data['tel_num']}"):
            resp = user_api.register_login(
                tel_num=data["tel_num"],
                sms_code=data["sms_code"],
                country_code=data["country_code"],
            )
            result = assert_response_success(resp)
    
        with allure.step("校验返回码"):
>           assert_field_equal(result, "retCode", data["expected_ret_code"])
